case_title: AUTOVEST LLC VS. SHELDON SILAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SILAS, SHELDON DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2020

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200005664) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-29-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
